columns.extraction_plan: The median on-treatment duration for the treatment arm (SOC + AAP) is reported in the text. Extract the numerical value and unit from the sentence: "Median time on abiraterone in the SOC + AAP group was 29 months (IQR 12-71)".

The control arm (SOC-alone) received "lifelong ADT" or "ADT until disease progression" as stated on page 4 and page 3 (abstract). A specific median duration in months for this on-treatment period for the control arm is not reported in the document.
